description: TreeShell conversation management - ONLY shows conversations started from TreeShell

conversations.description:
Conversation management for TreeShell-originated chats ONLY.

This system tracks conversations started from TreeShell. Other heaven conversations are NOT shown here.

Options:
1. start - Begin a new TreeShell conversation
2. continue - Continue the active conversation
3. list - Show recent TreeShell conversations
4. load - Load a TreeShell conversation by ID
5. search - Search TreeShell conversations

start.description: Start a new conversation. Registers the conversation in the TreeShell registry so it appears in 'list' and can be loaded.

continue.description: Continue the current active TreeShell conversation.

list.description: Show recent TreeShell conversations ONLY. Filters out all other heaven conversations.

load.description: Switch to an existing TreeShell conversation by ID. Non-TreeShell conversations cannot be loaded.

search.description: Search TreeShell conversations by title or tags ONLY.
